basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: IIT Delhi is recruiting 1 post of Research Associate. Last date to apply is 15 July 2026.

important_dates.interview_date: To be communicated to shortlisted candidates (Online)

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: As per GoI norms | relaxation: 5% relaxation of marks for SC/ST candidates
qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Physics, M.Sc. (First Class), NET/GATE qualified

selection_process: Shortlisted candidates will be informed for Online Interview. IIT Delhi reserves the right to fix higher criteria for shortlisting. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview.
how_to_apply: Download Form No. IRD/REC-4 from the IRD Website of IIT Delhi.
Fill the form with complete details.
Send the duly filled form along with CV and supporting documents by email to [email protected].
Mention Advertisement No. IITD/IRD/165/2026 in the subject line.
important_instructions: Appointment is purely contractual and co-terminus with the project. The Institute reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Selected candidate may get opportunity for further research.

content_sections.heading: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IITD) invites applications from Indian nationals for the post of Research Associate under the ANRF (SERB) funded project in the Optics and Photonics Centre. Download Indian Institute of Technology Delhi Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT Delhi is recruiting 1 post of Research Associate. Last date to apply is 15 July 2026.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_delhi_iit: Design and development of inhomogeneous wave plates by conjugate optics (RM00112G)

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
IIT Delhi Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: Ph.D. in Physics, M.Sc. (First Class), NET/GATE qualified
Experience or exposure to non-Hermitian optics
5% relaxation of marks for SC/ST candidates

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Fellowship Details
content_sections.text: Consolidated Pay: Rs. 58,000/- per month + HRA @27%

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisted candidates will be informed for Online Interview. IIT Delhi reserves the right to fix higher criteria for shortlisting. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for IIT Delhi Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: Appointment is purely contractual and co-terminus with the project. The Institute reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Selected candidate may get opportunity for further research.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Delhi Research Associate 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for application submission is 15 July 2026 by 5:00 p.m.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Research Associate at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: Rs. 58,000/- per month plus HRA @27%.

faq.question: Q3. What qualifications are required for IIT Delhi Research Associate post?
faq.answer: Ph.D. in Physics with M.Sc. (First Class) and NET/GATE qualification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the project title for IIT Delhi RM00112G recruitment?
faq.answer: “Design and development of inhomogeneous wave plates by conjugate optics”.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for IIT Delhi Research Associate vacancy?
faq.answer: Download IRD/REC-4 form and send it with CV to [email protected] with proper subject line.

faq.question: Q6. Is GATE score mandatory for IIT Delhi Research Associate position?
faq.answer: Yes, NET/GATE qualification is required along with Ph.D.

faq.question: Q7. What is the duration of the project at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: The project duration is upto 13 March 2030.

faq.question: Q8. Is experience in non-Hermitian optics required for this position?
faq.answer: It is preferable. Candidates with relevant exposure will be given preference.

faq.question: Q9. Will the interview for IIT Delhi Research Associate be online?
faq.answer: Yes, shortlisted candidates will be informed for online interview.

faq.question: Q10. Is the IIT Delhi Research Associate position permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is purely on contractual basis under the project.
